scenarios.objective: Identify the full network-facing footprint, including subdomains, DNS records, and naming relationships.
Enumerate exposed ports and capture service banners to build a comprehensive service inventory.
Identify service versions, feature capabilities, and specific protocol metadata.
Document TLS versions, certificate details, and cipher suite configurations to identify transport weaknesses.
Map reachable administrative interfaces, login prompts, and management protocols (SSH, RDP, Web-Admin).
Identify low-noise entry points such as anonymous file shares, metadata leaks, or public data surfaces.
Infer segmentation boundaries, filtering behavior, and defensive responses like rate limiting or tarpits.
Link network findings to web/API surfaces and define explicit prerequisites for exploitation.
